title: Add the following flags to buildah bud and from
body:
Add the following flags to buildah bud and from

        --add-host
        --cgroup-parent
        --cpu-period
        --cpu-quota
        --cpu-shares
        --cpuset-cpus
        --cpuset-mems
        --memory
        --memory-swap
        --security-opt
        --ulimit

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: bot looks to have ignored me.  Going to close and reopen to retest.

Nit on your spelling mistake in check in messages folowing.
 Add the folowing flags to buildah bud and from
Can you add some tests?  Stuff we can steel from Podman?
Added tests and fixed the typo in the commit message.
Oh, forgot to mention, you'll need to add these to libpod build too, but that will be straight forward.

> I'm fine with this going in now. A few nits here and there. I didn't see any tests for buds.bats and I don't think you'd tests for all of the new common options. It would be nice to get those added in a follow up PR or commit if possible.

@TomSweeneyRedHat it is hard to test these options for buildah bud because the values are not retained when the container is created using buildah form. These options are to limit the resources when the build itself is happening. It is something QE can test through debug statements though.
Ok on the buildah bud tests then.  I'm sure QE will be looking forward to some detailed qe tips then.

:pushpin: Commit a9743ea has been approved by `rhatdan`

@umohnani8 I think there were a few more docker build options, that we currently don't implement, could you look into those.
